description: 12V 2A AC Adapter – Compatible Power Cable for BT Openreach ONT and 12V Devices This high-quality 12V 2A power cable for openreach ont is designed as a reliable replacement for the BT Openreach power cable. Compatible with BT Openreach ONT devices such as the EchoLife HG612, ECI modems, bt ont power cable also supports a wide range of 12V devices including routers, LED strips, security cameras, Echo Dot, and more. Key Features Broad Compatibility Fully compatible with BT Openreach ONT modems and routers. Works as a replacement for models like EchoLife HG612 and ECI, and fits for Openreach Nokia ONT devices. This for ont openreach power cable is suitable for a wide range of fiber installations and 12V devices. Stable Power Output Input: 100-240V AC, 50/60Hz; Output: 12V 2A (max 24W). With a 1.5-meter power cord, this for ont power cable openreach ensures steady voltage delivery and is ideal for both home and office network environments. Safe and Reliable Design Built with flame-retardant ABS material and premium internal components. Features built-in protections against over-voltage, over-current, overheating, and short-circuits to ensure safe operation for daily and long-term use. Durable Construction Reinforced cable joints and wear-resistant materials provide extra durability. This for bt openreach ont power cable is designed to endure frequent bending and plugging, making it a dependable choice for network stability. Easy to Use Plug-and-play design. No drivers or tools needed. Just connect and power your device immediately. Ideal as a direct replacement for the original bt openreach fibre power cable or bt open reach ont power cable. Product Specifications Input: 100-240V AC, 50/60Hz Output: 12V 2A (2000mA), max power 24W DC Connector Size: 5.5mm x 2.1mm Cable Length: 1.5 meters (4.9 ft) Color: White Use: Indoor only Note: Please confirm that your device requires 12V 2A with a 5.5x2.1mm connector before purchasing. Not compatible with devices requiring more than 24W power.
